title: cryptanthus × cochleatus
intro: Cryptanthus × cochleatus, also known as the Alcantarea, is a hybrid plant species in the bromeliad family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cryptanthus × cochleatus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. It can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
